variables.name: nbds/color/text/primary/default
variables.description: Main text; high-emphasis content on light foregrounds. Primary text colour.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/secondary/default
variables.description: Supporting text; body copy and less-emphasis content.

variables.name: nbds/color/background/primary/default
variables.description: Primary page canvas. Z = 0 (per strategy §6.2.0). Strictly non-interactive.

variables.name: nbds/color/feedback/text/negative/default
variables.description: Error / destructive message text on light foregrounds.

variables.name: nbds/color/border/divider/default
variables.description: Subtle divider for separating content blocks.

variables.name: nbds/color/foreground/secondary/default
variables.description: Secondary foreground; layered content above primary foreground. Z = 2.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/accent/default
variables.description: Accent text colour. Used for eyebrow / lead-in copy and other emphasised text moments where attention is needed without communicating a status. Resolves to amber/600 by default.

variables.name: nbds/color/icon/primary/default
variables.description: Default icon colour on light foregrounds.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/link/default
variables.description: Link text colour (legacy). New work should use nbds/color/link/default. Will be reviewed for deprecation in Phase 5.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/default
variables.description: Primary button fill, default state. NB Black.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/text/primary/default
variables.description: Primary button text/icon colour, default state.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/promo/default
variables.description: Promotional text (sale, limited edition messaging). NB Red for brand prominence.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/primary/inverse
variables.description: Primary text on dark foregrounds (footer, hero overlays, dark CTAs).

variables.name: nbds/color/foreground/primary/default
variables.description: Primary foreground; base layer for components on the page background. Z=1.

variables.name: nbds/color/foreground/primary/inverse
variables.description: Primary foreground for dark CTA/footer panels.

variables.name: nbds/color/foreground/tertiary/default
variables.description: Tertiary foreground; deepest nesting tier. Z=3.

variables.name: nbds/color/background/primary/inverse
variables.description: Primary page canvas when the page is dark.

variables.name: nbds/color/feedback/foreground/negative/bold
variables.description: Prominent error fill (banners, toasts, critical alerts). NB Red.

variables.name: nbds/color/interactive/text/default-inverse
variables.description: Default interactive text on dark foregrounds.

variables.name: nbds/color/interactive/foreground/default
variables.description: Default fill of interactive container (chip, list row).

variables.name: nbds/color/interactive/border/default
variables.description: Default border for interactive form elements.

variables.name: nbds/color/interactive/border/focused
variables.description: Focused interactive border. Aliased to NB Red until focus ring tokens are created in Phase 3.4 — should re-alias to nbds/color/focus/ring/color/default then.

variables.name: nbds/color/interactive/border/focused-inverse
variables.description: Focused border on dark. Will re-alias to focus ring inverse after 3.4.

variables.name: nbds/color/link/focused
variables.description: Link focused. Aliased to NB Red — will re-alias to focus ring after Phase 3.4.

variables.name: nbds/color/link/focused-inverse
variables.description: Focused link on dark. Will re-alias to focus ring inverse after Phase 3.4.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/focused
variables.description: Primary button fill, focused (colour unchanged; focus ring handles indication).

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/primary/default
variables.description: Primary button border (same as fill — no visible border by default).

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/primary/focused
variables.description: Primary button border, focused. Aliased to NB Red — re-alias to focus ring after 3.4.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/secondary/default
variables.description: Secondary button fill, default (transparent or matches surface).

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/secondary/focused
variables.description: Secondary button border, focused. Re-alias to focus ring after 3.4.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/on-feedback/negative/bold
variables.description: Text on bold negative (red) feedback foregrounds. Guaranteed AA against feedback/foreground/negative/bold.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/on-feedback/positive/bold
variables.description: Text on bold positive (green) feedback foregrounds.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/on-feedback/warning/bold
variables.description: Text on bold warning (amber) feedback foregrounds.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/text/primary/default-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/text/primary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/default-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/secondary/default-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/disabled-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/disabled. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/text/primary/disabled-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/text/primary/disabled. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/hovered-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/hovered. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/pressed-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/pressed. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/secondary/hovered-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/hovered. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/button/border/secondary/pressed-inverse
variables.description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/pressed. Use on dark surfaces.

variables.name: nbds/color/text/accent/inverse
variables.description: Accent text colour on dark/inverted surfaces. Resolves to amber/300.
